education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Human-Computer Interaction

experience.title: UX Design Intern
responsibilities: Collaborated with design teams to create user interface mockups using Figma.
Assisted in conducting user research and gathering feedback through surveys.
Analyzed user interaction data using Google Analytics to identify usability issues.
Participated in team meetings to discuss design iterations and user feedback.

response.summary: Detail-oriented recent graduate with a strong foundation in human-computer interaction and practical experience in user experience design. Passionate about enhancing augmented reality applications and improving user interactions.
